name: South Broadway Country Club
about: South Broadway Country Club is a chain of indoor golf simulator facilities in Colorado, with locations in Denver and Fort Collins. Established in 2017, the venues feature TrackMan technology and offer full-service cocktail bars, creating a hybrid environment for golfing and socializing. The company provides a premium indoor golf experience through advanced simulator technology and professional golf instruction.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan simulator technology for accurate data and course rendering
Full-service cocktail bars creating a social golf environment
Professional golf instruction available for all skill levels
Multiple locations with unique atmospheres like The Crow's Nest

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service cocktail bars at all locations, including curated craft beverages at The Crow's Nest

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar technology with Optically Enhanced Radar Tracking (OERT)

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specify whether they provide club rentals, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted as the venues offer full-service kitchen and cocktail bars.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the exact time for 18 holes, but typical simulator rounds take 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly mention child-friendly policies, so it's best to contact them directly for information on bringing children.
